# GREP(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  grep — search for patterns in files

## SYNOPSIS
  grep [OPTIONS] [ARGS]

## DESCRIPTION
Search input for lines matching a pattern.

## OPTIONS
  -i  case insensitive
  -r  recursive search
  -n  show line numbers
  -v  invert match

## EXAMPLES
  grep 'password' /etc/config
  grep -ri 'chimera' /opt
  grep -n 'error' app.log

## ENVIRONMENT
  Terminal Depths v1.0 — cyberpunk hacking simulation

## SEE ALSO
  help, man, commands
